ddls:
CREATE TABLE "practitioners" (
  "practitioner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practitioner */,
  "npi" TEXT /* National Provider Identifier (NPI) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the practitioner */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the practitioner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the practitioner */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials of the practitioner */,
  "medical_school" TEXT /* Name of the medical school attended */,
  "graduation_year" TEXT /* Year of graduation from medical school */,
  "primary_specialty" TEXT /* Primary specialty of the practitioner */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community the practitioner belongs to */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the practitioner */,
  "promoting_interoperability_score" REAL /* Score for promoting interoperability */,
  "cost_score" REAL /* Cost score of the practitioner */,
  "improvement_activities_score" REAL /* Score for improvement activities */,
  "overall_mips_score" REAL /* Overall MIPS score */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the practitioner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the practitioner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the practitioner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the practitioner */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the practitioner */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* State where the license is issued */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the practitioner was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the practitioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practitioner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioners_primary_specialty FOREIGN KEY ("primary_specialty") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioners_medical_school FOREIGN KEY ("medical_school") REFERENCES medical_schools ("school_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioners_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the community */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the community */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community */,
  "total_practitioners" INTEGER /* Total number of practitioners in the community */,
  "healthcare_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities in the community */,
  "average_quality_score" REAL /* Average quality score of practitioners in the community */,
  "average_overall_mips_score" REAL /* Average overall MIPS score of practitioners in the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the medical school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the medical school */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the medical school */,
  "total_graduates" INTEGER /* Total number of graduates from the medical school */,
  "average_graduation_year" INTEGER /* Average graduation year of practitioners from the medical school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the specialty */,
  "average_quality_score" REAL /* Average quality score of practitioners in this specialty */,
  "average_overall_mips_score" REAL /* Average overall MIPS score of practitioners in this specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric in the overall MIPS score calculation */,
  "goal_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practitioner_metrics" (
  "practitioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practitioner */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric for the specific practitioner */,
  "metric_comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practitioner_id", "metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practitioner_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational record */,
  "practitioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practitioner */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical school */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "graduation_year" TEXT /* Year of graduation */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree obtained */,
  "degree_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization within the degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioner_education_practitioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("practitioner_id") REFERENCES practitioners ("practitioner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioner_education_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES medical_schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practitioner_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "practitioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practitioner */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was obtained */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  "certifying_body" TEXT /* Name of the certifying body */,
  "renewal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the certification needs to be renewed */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Next renewal date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioner_certifications_practitioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("practitioner_id") REFERENCES practitioners ("practitioner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practitioner_employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "practitioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practitioner */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioner_employment_practitioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("practitioner_id") REFERENCES practitioners ("practitioner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "practitioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practitioner record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_practitioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("practitioner_id") REFERENCES practitioners ("practitioner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practitioner_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "practitioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practitioner */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (1-5) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., patient, peer, supervisor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioner_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practitioner_feedback_practitioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("practitioner_id") REFERENCES practitioners ("practitioner_id")
)
